info.title: Complex.Cli
info.description: A code repository complexity analyzer CLI tool that analyzes git repositories and generates comprehensive reports with complexity scores and team size estimates. Supports multi-language analysis (C#, TypeScript, Python, C++) and comma-separated URLs for batch analysis.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Complex - A code repository complexity analyzer

commands.name: analyze
commands.description: Analyze one or more git repositories and generate a complexity report
